messages:
Top-level directories include: `.cargo/` (Rust build config), `configs/` (service configurations), `crates/` (Rust source modules), `data/` (runtime data storage), `docker/` (Docker setup), `docs/` (documentation), `document/` (additional docs), `external_skills/` (external integrations), `image/` (assets/images), `logs/` (log outputs), `migrations/` (database migrations), `node_modules/` (Node.js dependencies), `patches/` (custom patches), `pi_app/` (Pi-specific app), `plans/` (planning docs), `prompts/` (AI prompts), `run/` (runtime files), `scripts/` (utility scripts), `services/` (service definitions), `skills_output/` (skill results), `systemd/` (systemd unit files), and `target/` (Rust build output).

This is a Rust-based service daemon project ("RustClaw") that bridges multiple messaging platforms (Telegram, WhatsApp, Feishu/Lark, etc.) with a web UI, organized with modular Rust crates, Docker support, systemd service management, and utility scripts for deployment and operation.
result_json.text:
Top-level directories include: `.cargo/` (Rust build config), `configs/` (service configurations), `crates/` (Rust source modules), `data/` (runtime data storage), `docker/` (Docker setup), `docs/` (documentation), `document/` (additional docs), `external_skills/` (external integrations), `image/` (assets/images), `logs/` (log outputs), `migrations/` (database migrations), `node_modules/` (Node.js dependencies), `patches/` (custom patches), `pi_app/` (Pi-specific app), `plans/` (planning docs), `prompts/` (AI prompts), `run/` (runtime files), `scripts/` (utility scripts), `services/` (service definitions), `skills_output/` (skill results), `systemd/` (systemd unit files), and `target/` (Rust build output).

This is a Rust-based service daemon project ("RustClaw") that bridges multiple messaging platforms (Telegram, WhatsApp, Feishu/Lark, etc.) with a web UI, organized with modular Rust crates, Docker support, systemd service management, and utility scripts for deployment and operation.
